title: CNBC Daily Open: Trump faces grueling marathon in Iran conflict as Putin heads to Beijing
summary_full: Days after Air Force One departed Beijing, Russian President Vladimir Putin is set to visit the Chinese capital for talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping.
summary_public: Days after Air Force One departed Beijing, Russian President Vladimir Putin is set to visit the Chinese capital for talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping.
